description: A designed DHS social-media spotlight card in a soft pastel color scheme (lavender/pink/light-blue paper-texture background). The top-left corner has a fan of diagonal rainbow/Pride-flag stripes (including the Progress Pride colors: black, brown, pink, white, blue) overlaid with the white outlined headline 'LIVING OUR TRUTH.' Top-right reads 'DHS celebrates' with 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' rendered in multicolor rainbow letters. Centered is a circular cropped photo, framed by a rainbow-gradient ring, of an older man in a light-gray/tan suit standing outdoors on a brick path in a garden, gesturing while speaking, with a small audience of onlookers behind him. Below is a large blue quotation-mark glyph and a serif/sans block quote: "This year's Pride theme, 'Living Our Truth,' resonates deeply with us. The Secretary encouraged us to embrace our authentic selves, both within the Department and beyond. Building on last year's theme, 'Voices for Change,' we recognize that being true to ourselves is essential to creating a safe and welcoming environment." Bottom-left has a small vertical rainbow bar and an attribution: 'Paul A. / Office of Intelligence & Analysis, Deputy Director of Workforce Well-Being / with DHS for 24+ Years.' Bottom-right shows the circular DHS (U.S. Department of Homeland Security) seal accented with rainbow strokes. This is workforce-affinity / diversity-celebration messaging (Pride Month) produced under the prior administration, intended to portray DHS as an inclusive, welcoming employer; target audience is the DHS workforce and the general public.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; "This year's Pride theme, 'Living Our Truth,' resonates deeply with us..."; Paul A., Office of Intelligence & Analysis, Deputy Director of Workforce Well-Being, with DHS for 24+ Years
